metadata.description: Official Singlepane plugins for Claude — hospitality analytics tooling for Singlepane customers.

plugins.name: singlepane-excel-modeling
plugins.description: Build Excel financial models for hotel portfolios with the Singlepane Excel add-in's SP.* functions: summary P&Ls, department schedules, variance reports, portfolio rollups, STR dashboards, and pace reports using canonical USALI layouts. Includes the Singlepane MCP connector.
